title: Chaumian eCash
description: Chaumian eCash used blind signatures and a central issuer to create private digital cash before Bitcoin. Studying it shows how pre-Bitcoin systems approached privacy and double-spend resistance while still depending on trusted mint operators.

resources.title: Protecting Privacy with Electronic Cash
resources.notes: Hal Finney's early cypherpunk case for anonymous electronic cash and why blind signatures mattered.

resources.title: The Beauty of eCash
resources.notes: Hal Finney's follow-on note illustrating what made Chaum-style digital cash distinctive as a bearer instrument.

resources.title: Genesis Book
resources.notes: Useful historical framing for the cypherpunk digital-cash lineage that preceded Bitcoin.
